package_title: I will build an autonomous market/competitor research agent
description:
🔧 I will build an autonomous market/competitor research agent

I deliver an agent that monitors competitors, pricing, and news and emails you a weekly digest using Crawl4AI + n8n + Listmonk + Flowise — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $800-$2,500 setup + $299-$999/mo retainer
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($225, 5 days, 1 rev): Single agent, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($900, 10 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 agents, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($1800, 14 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited agents, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the autonomous agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
